scripts.test: cargo test --workspace && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/core test && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/control test && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/mcp test && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/cli test && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/tui test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/control typecheck && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/mcp typecheck && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @portable-devshell/tui typecheck
